State Rep. Steve Weir (R-55) — Connecticut House floor votes

Compiled from roll-call PDFs published by the Connecticut General Assembly. Each row links to the bill's tracking page, the official roll-call PDF, and (where available) the bill text. Rows where Weir voted against the majority of his party caucus are outlined.

Jump to: 2023 Regular Session2024 Regular Session2025 Regular Session2026 Regular Session

2023 Regular Session

368 House floor votes recorded. Weir voted Yea on 269, Nay on 99, was absent on 0. Voted with his party caucus on 332, against on 36.
